creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Yuri Victorovich from comment #2)

So you put the burden of finding the basic description for
the problem on the folks that would try to process your
submittal instead of including it in the description. When
an explicit assertion failure notice is present, I'd suggest
always including it in the description and having the
summary line mention "assertion failure" (it is more
specific than "crashes" and indicates some about the
kind of information available).
